text: What's telling is the failures are **intermittent within the same burst** — session #1 (codex/trellis) and #7 (codex/nostr-multi-platform) published fine, while #2–#6 and #8 (developer sessions + codex/58b2b02b) failed, all within about a second of each other right after `warmup()` completed. A permanently-missing flag would fail every publish; this pattern looks like a startup race in the relay-pool's internal state right as ~10 reconciled sessions all fire a domain-event publish through the single shared `Transport` simultaneously.
